Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Two cases A1 B2 with very similar sequences This suggests a standard operating procedure SOP Activities Breakdown Retrieve raw metal sheet Scan barcode Place metal sheet on table Align metal sheet Preheat metal sheet Pick up welding tool Weld corner A Weld corner B Measure weld integrity Apply protective coating Dry coating Visual check

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Decision Option A seems the most distinct and operationally useful Resources Operator A Robot Heating Unit 1 Prep Operator B Sensor 1 Assembly Coating Unit Heating Unit 2 Finishing Operator C Final QA Timestamps Prep 080005 to 080020 Gap 40 seconds Welding 080100 to 080120 Gap 10 seconds Finishing 080130 to 080145 Gap 15 seconds Final Check 080200

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Refining the Groups Revised Grouping Strategy 1 Material Setup Pre treatment Retrieval Scanning Placement Alignment Preheating 2 Assembly Joining Tool pickup Welding A Welding B Weld Integrity Check 3 Surface Finishing Coating Drying 4 Final Quality Assurance Visual Check Self Correction on Weld Integrity group it with Assembly Self Correction on Finishing Coating and Drying together

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Grouping based on temporal clustering performed by same resource type logically follow temporal closeness resources distinct functional areas Prep Make Finish Check Inline Quality Sensor vs Final Quality Human timestamp gaps represent movement cooling times
